messages.content:
Bjr, désolée votre modele de perroquet est incomprehensible meme en le traduisant ,dommage que les explications ne soient pas plus claires avec le traducteur , du coup je l'ai abandonné .
Cdt --- in english
Hello, I'm sorry, your parrot model is incomprehensible even when translated. It's a pity that the explanations are not clearer with the translator, so I gave up. Regards.

Please help to response review public: Customer left the note as "Bjr, désolée votre modele de perroquet est incomprehensible meme en le traduisant", after google translated : "Hello, sorry your parrot model is incomprehensible even when translating it".  our product is Carnation flower Fariry Pattern, Not Parrot model. We were trying to contact buyer but not susseful. It's unfair to leaveone star review as this. We are trying our best to provide the best service and products.

Dear [Customer],

Thank you for taking the time to leave a review. We understand that there may have been some confusion with the translation of our product description. We apologize for any misunderstanding that may have occurred.

However, we would like to clarify that the product you purchased is our Carnation Flower Fairy Pattern, not a parrot model. We strive to provide clear and accurate descriptions for all our products, but unfortunately, it seems that there was a misinterpretation in this case.

We have attempted to contact you to address your concerns directly, but it seems that our attempts have been unsuccessful so far. We would greatly appreciate the opportunity to discuss this matter further and find a suitable resolution.

At our company, we are committed to providing the best service and high-quality products to our customers. If there is anything else we can do to assist you or if you have any further questions, please do not hesitate to reach out to us directly.

Thank you for your understanding and we hope to hear from you soon.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Company Name]

I absolutely love this pattern! I can’t wait to create the stunning zebra wall hanging that will surely become a standout piece in my home décor. -5 star. How to post a public response for this review?

Dear [Customer],

Thank you so much for your amazing review! We're thrilled to hear that you love our Carnation Flower Fairy Pattern and that you're excited to create a stunning zebra wall hanging with it. We can't wait to see how it turns out!

Your support and positive feedback mean a lot to us. We strive to provide excellent patterns and designs that inspire our customers' creativity and help them create standout pieces in their home décor.

Once again, thank you for your kind words and for choosing our product. If you have any questions or need any assistance during your project, please don't hesitate to reach out to us. We're here to help!

Have a fantastic time creating your zebra wall hanging, and we hope it brings joy and beauty to your home.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Company Name]
customer left 5 star without words. How to response

If you have any further questions or need any assistance, please feel free to reach out to us. We're here to help!

Once again, thank you for your support. We look forward to serving you again in the future.

The pattern was easy to follow, which made the whole process an absolute breeze. The customer service was good, with the seller promptly providing an assembly video for me to reference. The product itself is absolutely adorable, and my daughter and I were able to create two stunning carnation flowers.

Dear [Customer],

Thank you so much for your wonderful review! We're thrilled to hear that you found our Carnation Flower Fairy Pattern easy to follow and that it made the entire process a breeze for you. 

We're also glad to hear that you had a positive experience with our customer service. We believe in providing prompt and helpful assistance to our customers, and we're glad that we were able to provide you with an assembly video to help with your project.

It warms our hearts to know that you and your daughter were able to create two stunning carnation flowers using our pattern. We designed it with love and care to bring joy and beauty into the lives of our customers, and it's wonderful to hear that it achieved that for you.

Thank you again for your kind words and for choosing our product. If you ever need any further assistance or have any more projects you'd like to share with us, please don't hesitate to reach out. We're always here to help and support you.

Wishing you and your daughter many more creative and enjoyable moments together!

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Company Name]

If you have any questions or need any assistance while working on your project, please don't hesitate to reach out. We're here to support you every step of the way.

Thank you again for choosing our pattern and for your kind words. We hope you have a wonderful time creating your mandala masterpiece!

Best regards,
